_documentation.description: Create multiple jobs in a single API call

jobs.title: Senior Accountant
jobs.description: Prepare and review financial statements, manage general ledger, and ensure GAAP compliance for corporate clients.
jobs.requirements: CPA license, 5+ years accounting experience, strong knowledge of GAAP, proficiency in accounting software
jobs.skills: GAAP, Financial Reporting, General Ledger, QuickBooks, Excel

jobs.title: Staff Accountant
jobs.description: Handle daily bookkeeping, accounts payable/receivable, bank reconciliations, and assist with month-end close.
jobs.requirements: Bachelor's in Accounting, 1-2 years experience, Excel proficiency, attention to detail
jobs.skills: Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable, Bank Reconciliation, Journal Entries, Excel

jobs.title: Tax Manager
jobs.description: Manage tax compliance and planning for high-net-worth individuals and corporations. Supervise tax staff.
jobs.requirements: CPA license, 7+ years tax experience, mastery of tax code, client management skills
jobs.skills: Tax Compliance, Tax Planning, Corporate Tax, Individual Tax, IRS Regulations

jobs.title: Payroll Specialist
jobs.description: Process payroll for multiple clients, ensure tax compliance, and resolve payroll discrepancies.
jobs.requirements: 2+ years payroll experience, knowledge of payroll taxes, ADP or Paychex experience preferred
jobs.skills: Payroll Processing, ADP, Tax Withholding, Direct Deposit, Garnishments

jobs.title: Financial Controller
jobs.description: Oversee all accounting operations including month-end close, financial reporting, and internal controls.
jobs.requirements: CPA license, 10+ years accounting experience, manufacturing industry knowledge, ERP expertise
jobs.skills: Financial Controls, ERP Systems, Cash Flow Management, Audit Coordination, Team Leadership

jobs.title: Accounts Receivable Clerk
jobs.description: Process incoming payments, generate invoices, and follow up on overdue accounts.
jobs.requirements: High school diploma, basic accounting knowledge, attention to detail, customer service skills
jobs.skills: Invoicing, Collections, Data Entry, Microsoft Office, Customer Communication

jobs.title: Audit Senior Associate
jobs.description: Lead audit engagements for public and private clients. Evaluate internal controls and prepare audit reports.
jobs.requirements: CPA or CPA candidate, 3+ years audit experience, strong analytical skills, team player
jobs.skills: Audit Procedures, Internal Controls, Risk Assessment, Financial Analysis, Team Collaboration

jobs.title: Bookkeeper
jobs.description: Maintain accurate financial records for small businesses including reconciliations and financial statements.
jobs.requirements: 2+ years bookkeeping experience, QuickBooks Online expert, reliable and organized
jobs.skills: QuickBooks Online, Bank Reconciliation, Financial Statements, Expense Tracking, 1099 Preparation

jobs.title: Cost Accountant
jobs.description: Analyze production costs, develop standard costing models, and identify cost savings opportunities.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years cost accounting experience, manufacturing background, strong analytical skills
jobs.skills: Cost Analysis, Standard Costing, Inventory Valuation, Variance Analysis, ERP Systems

jobs.title: Part-time Tax Preparer
jobs.description: Prepare individual and small business tax returns during tax season. Remote position with flexible hours.
jobs.requirements: PTIN required, 2+ tax seasons experience, knowledge of tax software, available Jan-April
jobs.skills: Tax Preparation, Drake or UltraTax, Client Communication, Tax Law Knowledge, Attention to Detail

jobs.title: Internal Auditor
jobs.description: Evaluate internal controls, identify risks, and recommend process improvements across retail operations.
jobs.requirements: CIA or CPA preferred, 4+ years audit experience, retail industry knowledge a plus
jobs.skills: Internal Audit, Risk Assessment, Process Improvement, Data Analytics, Report Writing

jobs.title: Financial Analyst
jobs.description: Build financial models, analyze investment opportunities, and support M&A transactions.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years investment banking or corporate finance, advanced Excel modeling, CFA progress a plus
jobs.skills: Financial Modeling, Valuation, DCF Analysis, Excel, PowerPoint

jobs.title: Accounts Payable Specialist
jobs.description: Process vendor invoices, manage payment runs, and resolve discrepancies with suppliers.
jobs.requirements: 2+ years AP experience, attention to detail, ERP experience preferred
jobs.skills: Invoice Processing, Three-Way Matching, Vendor Management, ERP Systems, Excel

jobs.title: Forensic Accountant
jobs.description: Investigate financial fraud, analyze complex transactions, and provide expert testimony.
jobs.requirements: CPA or CFE, 5+ years forensic accounting experience, strong investigative mindset
jobs.skills: Fraud Investigation, Data Analysis, Litigation Support, Expert Testimony, Financial Tracing

jobs.title: Accounting Manager
jobs.description: Supervise accounting team, oversee month-end close, and ensure accurate financial reporting.
jobs.requirements: CPA preferred, 7+ years accounting experience, hospitality industry experience a plus
jobs.skills: Team Management, Financial Reporting, Month-End Close, Budgeting, Internal Controls

jobs.title: Junior Financial Analyst
jobs.description: Support senior analysts with financial modeling, market research, and investment due diligence.
jobs.requirements: Bachelor's in Finance/Economics, strong Excel skills, internship experience preferred
jobs.skills: Excel, Financial Modeling, Research, Data Analysis, Presentation Skills

jobs.title: Tax Associate
jobs.description: Prepare corporate and partnership tax returns, conduct tax research, and assist with planning.
jobs.requirements: CPA or EA candidate, 2+ years tax experience, knowledge of tax software
jobs.skills: Tax Preparation, Tax Research, CCH Axcess, Corporate Tax, Partnership Tax

jobs.title: Credit Analyst
jobs.description: Evaluate commercial loan applications, analyze financial statements, and assess credit risk.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years credit analysis experience, strong financial analysis skills, banking knowledge
jobs.skills: Financial Statement Analysis, Credit Risk, Underwriting, Ratio Analysis, Loan Documentation

jobs.title: Remote QuickBooks Specialist
jobs.description: Provide remote bookkeeping services to multiple clients using QuickBooks Online.
jobs.requirements: QuickBooks ProAdvisor certification, 3+ years experience, excellent communication
jobs.skills: QuickBooks Online, Cleanup, Reconciliation, Financial Reports, Client Communication

jobs.title: Revenue Accountant
jobs.description: Manage revenue recognition under ASC 606 for subscription-based software company.
jobs.requirements: CPA preferred, 4+ years revenue accounting experience, ASC 606 expertise
jobs.skills: ASC 606, Revenue Recognition, Deferred Revenue, Contract Review, Month-End Close

jobs.title: Payroll Manager
jobs.description: Oversee multi-state payroll for 2000+ employees, ensure compliance, and manage payroll team.
jobs.requirements: CPP preferred, 7+ years payroll experience, multi-state tax knowledge, UKG experience
jobs.skills: Multi-State Payroll, Tax Compliance, Team Leadership, UKG/UltiPro, Reporting

jobs.title: Accounting Intern
jobs.description: Summer internship for accounting students. Gain hands-on experience in tax and audit.
jobs.requirements: Junior or senior in accounting program, 3.0+ GPA, eager to learn, strong work ethic
jobs.skills: Microsoft Office, Basic Accounting, Attention to Detail, Communication, Teamwork

jobs.title: International Tax Manager
jobs.description: Manage international tax compliance and planning for multinational clients.
jobs.requirements: CPA or EA, 8+ years international tax experience, knowledge of cross-border treaties
jobs.skills: International Tax, Transfer Pricing, Foreign Tax Credit, GILTI, Subpart F

jobs.title: Billing Coordinator
jobs.description: Process client invoices, track billable hours, and manage collections for law firm.
jobs.requirements: 1+ years billing experience, legal billing software knowledge, detail-oriented
jobs.skills: Legal Billing, Client Invoicing, Collections, Aderant or Elite, Time Entry

jobs.title: Fund Accountant
jobs.description: Calculate NAV, prepare financial statements, and handle investor allocations for hedge funds.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years fund accounting experience, CPA a plus, knowledge of investment partnerships
jobs.skills: Fund Accounting, NAV Calculation, Investor Allocations, Financial Statements, Partnership Accounting

jobs.title: Fixed Asset Accountant
jobs.description: Track and depreciate fixed assets, conduct physical inventory, and ensure proper capitalization.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years fixed asset accounting, knowledge of depreciation methods, strong Excel
jobs.skills: Fixed Assets, Depreciation, Capitalization Policies, Asset Tracking, Inventory

jobs.title: Part-time Accounting Clerk
jobs.description: Part-time position handling data entry, filing, and basic bookkeeping tasks.
jobs.requirements: High school diploma, basic accounting knowledge, reliable transportation
jobs.skills: Data Entry, Filing, Excel, Basic Bookkeeping, Organization

jobs.title: Director of Finance
jobs.description: Lead finance and accounting function, manage budgeting, forecasting, and financial strategy.
jobs.requirements: CPA and MBA preferred, 12+ years finance experience, healthcare industry knowledge
jobs.skills: Strategic Planning, Budgeting, Forecasting, Treasury Management, Team Leadership

jobs.title: Property Accountant
jobs.description: Manage accounting for commercial and residential properties including CAM reconciliations.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years property accounting experience, Yardi or MRI software knowledge
jobs.skills: Property Accounting, CAM Reconciliation, Rent Roll, Yardi/MRI, Financial Reporting

jobs.title: Government Grant Accountant
jobs.description: Track and report on government grant expenditures ensuring compliance with regulations.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years grant accounting experience, knowledge of Uniform Guidance, attention to detail
jobs.skills: Grant Accounting, Compliance, Government Regulations, Financial Reporting, Audit Support

jobs.title: Treasury Analyst
jobs.description: Manage cash positioning, forecasting, and banking relationships for corporate clients.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years treasury experience, CTP a plus, strong analytical and communication skills
jobs.skills: Cash Management, Forecasting, Bank Reconciliation, Debt Compliance, Investment Analysis

jobs.title: Remote Tax Accountant
jobs.description: Prepare and review tax returns remotely for individuals and small businesses nationwide.
jobs.requirements: CPA or EA, 4+ years tax experience, proficiency in tax software
jobs.skills: Tax Preparation, Tax Planning, Client Communication, UltraTax, Remote Collaboration

jobs.title: Inventory Accountant
jobs.description: Manage inventory valuation, cost of goods sold, and reconcile inventory counts.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years inventory accounting experience, retail or manufacturing background
jobs.skills: Inventory Valuation, COGS, Cycle Counts, Variance Analysis, ERP Systems

jobs.title: Mergers & Acquisitions Accountant
jobs.description: Support financial due diligence and purchase accounting for M&A transactions.
jobs.requirements: CPA, 5+ years accounting experience, M&A or transaction services background
jobs.skills: Due Diligence, Purchase Accounting, Quality of Earnings, Integration, Valuation

jobs.title: Construction Accountant
jobs.description: Manage job costing, progress billings, and contract accounting for construction projects.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years construction accounting experience, knowledge of percentage of completion method
jobs.skills: Job Costing, Progress Billing, AIA Documents, Contract Accounting, Construction Software

jobs.title: Financial Reporting Manager
jobs.description: Prepare SEC filings including 10-K, 10-Q, and ensure SOX compliance.
jobs.requirements: CPA, 7+ years experience, SEC reporting expertise, public company background
jobs.skills: SEC Reporting, 10-K, 10-Q, SOX Compliance, Technical Accounting, Workiva

jobs.title: Non-Profit Accountant
jobs.description: Manage fund accounting, grant tracking, and prepare Form 990 for non-profit organization.
jobs.requirements: 2+ years non-profit accounting experience, knowledge of fund accounting principles
jobs.skills: Fund Accounting, Grant Management, Form 990, Donor Restrictions, QuickBooks Non-Profit

jobs.title: Technical Accounting Manager
jobs.description: Research complex accounting issues, document positions, and implement new standards.
jobs.requirements: CPA, 8+ years technical accounting experience, strong research and writing skills
jobs.skills: Technical Research, ASC Codification, Memo Writing, New Standard Adoption, SEC Reporting

jobs.title: Accounting Data Analyst
jobs.description: Analyze accounting data, build dashboards, and automate reporting processes.
jobs.requirements: Accounting background plus data analytics skills, SQL proficiency, BI tools experience
jobs.skills: SQL, Tableau/Power BI, Data Analysis, Accounting Principles, Automation

jobs.title: Trust Accountant
jobs.description: Administer trust accounts, prepare fiduciary accountings, and ensure compliance.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years trust or estate accounting experience, knowledge of fiduciary accounting
jobs.skills: Trust Accounting, Fiduciary Reporting, Estate Administration, Tax Compliance, Client Service

jobs.title: Seasonal Tax Preparer
jobs.description: Seasonal position for tax season. Prepare individual tax returns at retail locations.
jobs.requirements: PTIN required, previous tax prep experience, customer service skills
jobs.skills: Individual Tax Preparation, Customer Service, Tax Software, E-filing, Interview Skills

jobs.title: ERP Accounting Specialist
jobs.description: Configure and implement NetSuite accounting modules for clients. Bridge gap between accounting and technology.
jobs.requirements: Accounting degree, NetSuite certification, 4+ years implementation experience
jobs.skills: NetSuite, Implementation, Accounting Processes, Training, Configuration

jobs.title: Accounts Payable Manager
jobs.description: Lead AP team, optimize payment processes, and manage vendor relationships.
jobs.requirements: 5+ years AP management experience, process improvement skills, ERP expertise
jobs.skills: AP Management, Team Leadership, Process Improvement, Vendor Relations, ERP Systems

jobs.title: Junior Accountant
jobs.description: Entry-level position supporting senior accountants with reconciliations and journal entries.
jobs.requirements: Recent accounting graduate, internship experience, strong Excel skills
jobs.skills: Bank Reconciliation, Journal Entries, Excel, General Ledger, Attention to Detail

jobs.title: Financial Due Diligence Manager
jobs.description: Lead financial due diligence engagements for private equity and corporate clients.
jobs.requirements: CPA, 6+ years due diligence experience, strong analytical and communication skills
jobs.skills: Financial Due Diligence, Quality of Earnings, Working Capital Analysis, Deal Advisory, Report Writing

jobs.title: Remote Bookkeeper (Part-time)
jobs.description: Part-time remote bookkeeping for multiple small business clients. Flexible schedule.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years bookkeeping experience, QuickBooks Online expert, reliable internet
jobs.skills: QuickBooks Online, Bank Reconciliation, Expense Tracking, Client Communication, Time Management

jobs.title: Insurance Accountant
jobs.description: Manage statutory accounting, premium and loss reserves for insurance carrier.
jobs.requirements: 4+ years insurance accounting experience, knowledge of STAT accounting principles
jobs.skills: Statutory Accounting, Premium Accounting, Loss Reserves, Reinsurance, NAIC Reporting

jobs.title: Payroll Tax Specialist
jobs.description: Ensure payroll tax compliance across multiple states, prepare tax filings, and resolve notices.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years payroll tax experience, multi-state expertise, strong attention to detail
jobs.skills: Payroll Tax, Multi-State Filing, Tax Notices, Quarterly Returns, Year-End Processing

jobs.title: Senior Financial Accountant
jobs.description: Lead month-end close, prepare consolidated financial statements, and support external audit.
jobs.requirements: CPA, 5+ years experience, public accounting background preferred, strong technical skills
jobs.skills: Month-End Close, Consolidations, Financial Statements, Audit Support, Technical Accounting

jobs.title: Accounting Systems Analyst
jobs.description: Bridge accounting and IT, manage ERP system upgrades, and automate manual processes.
jobs.requirements: Accounting degree plus IT aptitude, 4+ years systems experience, ERP knowledge
jobs.skills: ERP Systems, System Implementation, Process Automation, SQL, Accounting Workflows

jobs.title: Bank Reconciliation Specialist
jobs.description: Perform daily and monthly bank reconciliations for multiple clients. Identify and resolve discrepancies.
jobs.requirements: 2+ years reconciliation experience, attention to detail, Excel proficiency
jobs.skills: Bank Reconciliation, Discrepancy Resolution, Excel, Accounting Software, Time Management

jobs.title: State and Local Tax (SALT) Associate
jobs.description: Specialize in state and local tax compliance, nexus studies, and controversy resolution.
jobs.requirements: 2+ years SALT experience, knowledge of multi-state tax issues, research skills
jobs.skills: SALT Compliance, Nexus Studies, Income/Franchise Tax, Sales Tax, Voluntary Disclosure

jobs.title: Corporate Accounting Manager
jobs.description: Manage corporate accounting team, oversee global consolidation, and improve processes.
jobs.requirements: CPA, 8+ years experience, public company experience, strong leadership skills
jobs.skills: Team Management, Global Consolidations, Process Improvement, Internal Controls, Financial Systems
